task_completion.description: Create a Title slide for the executive readout presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A presentation slide visible in the editor with a title related to the 'Express Checkout' usability study.

task_completion.description: Create a Methodology slide mentioning the 30 participants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide containing text that describes the methodology and explicitly mentions '30 participants'.

task_completion.description: Create a Quantitative slide with the calculated Average SUS Score and Overall Task Success Rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide displaying quantitative metrics, specifically labeled 'Average SUS Score' and 'Task Success Rate' (or similar), with calculated numerical values.

task_completion.description: Create a Qualitative slide with at least two impactful verbatim quotes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide containing at least two distinct user quotes formatted as text.

task_completion.description: Create a Visuals slide featuring the checkout prototype screenshot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide containing an inserted image of a checkout interface/prototype.
The presentation software window title shows 'ux_research_readout.pptx' or a file manager window shows the saved file in the 'Presentations' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI presentation application (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) to build the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a presentation software interface, rather than just running a terminal script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent entered text into slide text boxes rather than pasting screenshots of text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Quotes and metrics appear as editable text within slide layouts, not as pasted image blocks of terminal outputs or text editors.

integrity.description: The prototype image was actually inserted into a presentation slide.
integrity.visual_evidence: The checkout prototype image is visible inside the presentation slide canvas, not just opened in a separate image viewer application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ux_research_readout.pptx' and contain at least 5 slides. The methodology slide must mention exactly 30 participants. For the quantitative slide, accurate calculation of the provided dataset yields a true average SUS score of 69.07 and an overall task success rate of 84.44% (76 out of 90 tasks). Accept these true calculated values as correct. The qualitative slide must include at least two quotes sourced from '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/user_quotes.txt'.
